images.caption: Fresh off the plane. A lovely night stroll through Prague's main square.

images.name: IMG_1775342423924_1.jpg
images.caption: The Astrological Clock: apparently the 2nd most disappointing tourist attraction in the world, second to the lovely Mona Lisa

images.name: IMG_1775342440791_3.jpg
images.caption: 287 steps up the tower in St. Vitus Cathedral.

images.name: IMG_1775342449516_4.jpg
images.caption: Some misc. stained glass 🤤

images.name: IMG_1775342458916_5.jpg
images.caption: Statue of Franz Kafka atop (the ghost of) his father, capturing the way Kafka saw himself in relation to his father (daddy issues)

images.name: IMG_1775342467930_6.jpg
images.caption: Czech Golaush, which I learned after is actually technically the national dish of Hungary so that's slightly awkward. Regardless, is was delicious.

images.name: IMG_1775342476290_7.jpg
images.caption: Imagine two entire stories of this...

images.name: IMG_1775342485331_8.jpg
images.caption: Czech soda. It was eh.

images.name: IMG_1775342494464_9.jpg
images.caption: Miral and I searched far and wide for pomegranate "jemně perlivá voda" or mildly sparkling water. You can always rely on Lidl. The tiny little bubbles were scrumptous. To our dismay, we learned that 1. this was actually orange and we misidentified the fruit pictured on the bottle and 2. there is like 60g of sugar in this thing. No wonder it was so good.

images.name: IMG_1775342503512_10.jpg
images.caption: Not pictured: the "no taking pictures" sign

images.name: IMG_1775342514325_11.jpg
images.caption: A little chimney cake: a spiral pastry covered in sugar. We opted for nutella. Advertised as the desert of Prague but actually this one was from Hungary as well. Figures.

images.name: IMG_1775342523288_12.jpg
images.caption: Found an egg.

images.name: IMG_1775342534396_13.jpg
images.caption: LOOK AT THIS BABY JESUS. THEY MAKE TINY DRESSES FOR HIM.

images.name: IMG_1775342543849_14.jpg
images.caption: The work and legacy of one Antonín Langweil, a Czech lithographer and library assistant. Being a failed artist, devoted 11 years of his life creating a replica of the entire city of prague as it was in the 19th century. Following the museum's rejection of his model and his dying of TB, some emperor purchased and recoverd it, preserving what the city looked like at this time. Sad story really.

images.name: IMG_1775342552805_15.jpg
images.caption: I believe this is the street food/tourist version of ovocné knedlíky, which is a type of dumpling. We got one filled with apple and one with cheese, could you guess which is which?

images.name: IMG_1775342561091_16.jpg
images.caption: On the move. Our backpacks are only barely as big as we are.

images.name: IMG_1775342571410_17.jpg
images.caption: I love european candy so much.

images.name: IMG_1775588849366_0.jpg
images.caption: Mozart seemed like a strange, small, funny looking man. Apparently everyone hated him.

images.caption: Dirty hot chocolate 🤭

images.name: IMG_1775588878772_4.jpg
images.caption: Phone eats first. Strudel.

images.name: IMG_1775588886077_5.jpg
images.caption: We listened to mozart while we ate aforementioned strudel. Apparently mozart himself used to preform in this cafe so we really wanted to immerse ourselves in history yk.

images.name: IMG_1775588892426_6.jpg
images.caption: Something about italian marble, no?

images.name: IMG_1775588900734_7.jpg
images.caption: Personal fav from the Kunsthistorisches Museum. Pictured is a quarrelsome woman who oppresses her husband, fears nothing and no one, and even takes on the devil himself. Here, she energetically drives demons from the jaws of hell with her broom. Epic.

images.name: IMG_1775588908336_8.jpg
images.caption: Another good one. Tower of Babel.

images.name: IMG_1775588916861_9.jpg
images.caption: Find the imposter.

images.name: IMG_1775589034157_0.jpg
images.caption: Miral and I debated the ethics of french landscaping as represented specfically by this unnaturally conical tree. We decided it was weird and freaky. Feel free to weigh in.

images.name: IMG_1775589044691_1.jpg
images.caption: Little itty bitty sandwhiches with egg and fish on them!! They were way better than they look okay. Apparently a Vienese specialty.

images.name: IMG_1775589053417_2.jpg
images.caption: Unfortunately never had the opportunity to ask where they purchased their wigs.

images.name: IMG_1775589062747_3.jpg

images.name: IMG_1775589070542_4.jpg
images.caption: Waited in line and hunted down an ATM to eat schnitzel here. AND it was so worth it.

images.name: IMG_1775589077222_5.jpg
images.caption: Cheesin!

images.name: IMG_1775589085360_6.jpg
images.caption: This is the cake of Vienna. Sachet Torte. Dark Chocolate. Apricot. Cream. It does not get better than that.
